center.name: 若因维利
center.summary: 若因维利是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括美洲紅䴉，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Native flocks exist in Brazil; Colombia; French Guiana; Guyana; Suriname; and Venezuela, as well as the islands of the Netherlands Antilles, and Trinidad and Tobago. Flocks gather in wetlands and other marshy habitats, including mud flats, shoreline and rainforest. Outlying colonies have been identified in the coastal areas of the states of Espírito Santo, Rio de Janeiro, São Paulo (for example in the Santos-Cubatão mangroves of the Baixada Santista district), Paraná and Santa Catarina. In recent years, bird colonies can be seen as far south as in the coastal areas of Joinville and the island of São Francisco do Sul. The highest concentrations are found in the Llanos region of western Venezuela and eastern Colombia
